seoTitle: Violet Hill vs Voyager Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Violet Hill and Voyager Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Violet Hill vs Voyager Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Violet Hill and Voyager Point.
heading: Violet Hill vs Voyager Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Violet Hill, New South Wales and Voyager Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Voyager Point has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Violet Hill (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Violet Hill or Voyager Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Violet Hill has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Voyager Point scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Violet Hill scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Voyager Point scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Violet Hill or Voyager Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Voyager Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
